description: In-game news/events feed shown on the main menu

items.title: Welcome to Shadow Defense!
items.body: The greatest storybook characters need YOUR help. Place legendary heroes, upgrade their abilities, and save storytelling itself. Begin your journey in the Tome of Shadows!

items.title: Act IV: The Narrator's Realm
items.body: Complete the Shadow Author's story to unlock the ultimate challenge. Three ancient legends await rescue. The Narrator reveals his true form. Are you strong enough?

items.title: Tip of the Day
items.body: Each tower has 3 upgrade paths that STACK. You can max ONE path and go Tier 2 in a second. Choose wisely — your strategy defines your playstyle!
